title: Ecommerce Meta Ads Growth System
shortDescription: A structured advertising system covering campaign setup, audience testing, creative analysis, retargeting, message journeys, and performance decisions.
overview: The work focused on improving how a local ecommerce brand plans, measures, and responds to campaign performance.
Instead of treating ads as isolated creatives, the system connects offer, audience, customer message flow, storefront, and follow-up.
problem: The brand needed clearer campaign structure and more disciplined decisions around audiences, creatives, budgets, retargeting, and customer messages.
solution: I organized the funnel into cold acquisition, high-intent retargeting, creative testing, reporting, and operational response steps.
results: Better connection between advertising and customer handling
